user.title: Set up Phoenix Contact CHARX
user.description: Enter the IP address of your CHARX SEC-3xxx charging controller. Port 502 and Modbus server must be enabled in WBM → Network → Port Sharing.

cap_confirm.title: Charge Point limit reached
cap_confirm.description: The controller reports {detected} Charge Points, but this integration supports at most {cap} (UM EN CHARX SEC §2.3.3). Only the first {cap} Charge Points will be managed. Click Submit to continue.

dhcp_confirm.title: Phoenix Contact CHARX found
dhcp_confirm.description: A CHARX charging controller was found at {host} ({hostname}). Click Submit to connect and add it to Home Assistant.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Phoenix Contact CHARX
reconfigure.description: Re-probe the controller to update the Charge Point count. Existing entity IDs and history are preserved.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the controller. Check the IP address, that port 502 is open (WBM → Network → Port Sharing), and that the Modbus server is enabled (WBM → System Control → Status).
error.modbus_error: Connected but received a Modbus error. Check that the Modbus server is running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.wrong_device: The controller at this address is a different device. To switch controllers, remove this entry and add it again.

abort.already_configured: This CHARX controller is already configured.
